reviews.comment:
Es una YPF operada por el Automóvil Club Argentino, tiene surtidores de combustible para vehículos terrestres y sobre el muelle sobre el río Luján tiene surtidores para abastecer de combustible a las lanchas y barcos. Del orto lado del río tiene un camping muy amplio y bien instalado con mesas y parrillas, además cuenta con una proveeduría para comprar bebidas y alimentos

(Translated by Google)
It's a YPF service station operated by the Argentine Automobile Club. It has fuel pumps for land vehicles, and on the dock on the Luján River, it has pumps for refueling boats and ships. On the other side of the river, there's a very large and well-equipped campground with tables and grills, and it also has a general store where you can buy drinks and food.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14089662263619113914/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMybE9mRjhnRRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
